name: domino-game
description: Multiplayer Domino game with web client

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --names "server,client" -c "green.bold,magenta.bold" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
